string.text: Furgon needs a basic toolkit to perform repairs. He asked me to find one for him somewhere in the Zone.
Furgon, the Loner mechanic, is looking for a basic toolkit. He says he can make use of it for simpler repair jobs.
Find and bring Furgon a basic toolkit.
I gave Furgon the basic toolkit he asked for. He seemed happy and promised to improve his repair abilities.
Furgon now needs an advanced toolkit to handle more complex repairs. He asked me to help him locate one.
Furgon's workbench is lacking advanced tools. If I bring him an advanced toolkit, he’ll be able to offer better upgrades.
Search the Zone for an advanced toolkit and bring it to Furgon.
I brought the advanced toolkit to Furgon. He immediately started upgrading his setup.
Furgon wants to reach the peak of his craft and needs an expert toolkit. This will be hard to find.
The final step for Furgon’s workshop is getting an expert toolkit. With it, he’ll be able to perform the most advanced upgrades.
Bring Furgon an expert-level toolkit to complete his upgrade path.
Furgon was thrilled to receive the expert toolkit. His workshop is now fully equipped.
